---
format: 
  html:
    theme: meds-website-styles.scss
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
---

## {{< fa code-pull-request title="Symbol for pull request" >}} Contribute {#contribute}

Have suggestions for improving these materials? [File an issue on `r fontawesome::fa("github", fill = "#5A5A5A", a11y = "sem")` GitHub](https://github.com/UCSB-MEDS/intro-to-python/issues){target="_blank"}.
